title: Munby, Sarah - Permanent Secretary, Department for Science, Innovation and Technology - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Munby left her role at the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology in July 2025.  Lay Member of the Board of Governors, University of Manchester  Ms Munby sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the University of Manchester.  The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was announced in August 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
